summary: Iteration 98 - All features verified working: 1) Sales Directory page at /sales/directory with enrolled students table, filters (month/year/agent/search), correct columns (Sr, Name, Email, Phone, Course, Amount, Paid By, Agent, Enrolled), descending order by enrolled_at. 2) Sales CRM Kanban/Table toggle working. 3) Security endpoints (claret-profiles, team-chat-data, claret-chats) restricted to CEO/Admin only - sales_executive correctly denied with 403. 4) Claret onboarding questions endpoint returns 7 MCQ + 3 open questions in English/Hinglish/Manglish. 5) Sales Directory access control working - sales_executive cannot access page (redirected, menu hidden, API returns 403).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 98 verified multiple new features: 1) Sales Directory page (/sales/directory) shows enrolled students with all required columns and filters. Data sorted by enrolled_at descending. 976 total enrolled students with AED 293,201 revenue. 2) Sales CRM has Kanban/Table toggle (displayMode state) - both views working. 3) Security endpoints (/api/security/claret-profiles, /api/security/team-chat-data, /api/security/claret-chats) restricted to super_admin and admin roles only. 4) Claret onboarding questions endpoint returns 7 MCQ + 3 open questions in 3 languages. 5) Access control verified - sales_executive cannot access Sales Directory (menu hidden, redirected on direct navigation, API returns 403). 6) Claret T&C checkbox appears on last open-ended question in onboarding modal.

sales_directory_page.details: Page loads at /sales/directory with enrolled students table. Shows 976 enrolled students, AED 293,201 revenue. Columns: Sr, Name, Email, Phone, Course, Amount, Paid By, Agent, Enrolled. Filters: Month, Year, Agent, Search.

sales_directory_sorting.details: Data sorted by enrolled_at descending (most recent first - 25 Mar 2026 at top).

sales_crm_kanban_table_toggle.details: Kanban/Table toggle working. Kanban shows 8 columns (New Lead, No Answer, Call Back, Warm Lead, Hot Lead, In Progress, Rejected, Enrolled). Table view shows leads in tabular format.

security_claret_profiles.details: GET /api/security/claret-profiles returns all Claret profiles. Accessible by super_admin/admin only. Sales executive gets 403.

security_team_chat_data.details: GET /api/security/team-chat-data returns team chat conversations. Accessible by super_admin/admin only. Sales executive gets 403.

security_claret_chats.details: GET /api/security/claret-chats returns Claret chat history. Accessible by super_admin/admin only.

claret_onboarding_questions.details: GET /api/claret/onboarding-questions returns 7 MCQ + 3 open questions. Available in English, Hinglish, Manglish.

sales_directory_access_control.details: Sales Directory restricted to super_admin, admin, sales_manager. Sales executive: menu hidden, redirected on direct navigation, API returns 403.

claret_tnc_checkbox.details: T&C checkbox appears on last open-ended question in ClaretOnboardingModal. Required before saving profile.
